title: briza maxima var. rubra
intro: Briza maxima var. rubra, also known as red quaking grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Briza maxima var. rubra include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it has also been used in herbal remedies such as salves and ointments to treat skin conditions and wounds.
